title: Transfer by gift
doc_html:
§754.  Transfer by gift

A person may make a transfer by irrevocable gift to a custodian for the benefit of a minor pursuant to R.S. 9:759.  

Acts 1987, No. 469, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1988.
doc_text:
§754.  Transfer by gift
A person may make a transfer by irrevocable gift to a custodian for the benefit of a minor pursuant to R.S. 9:759.
Acts 1987, No. 469, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1988.
